description_long: This is a rectangular loaf of multigrain bread, featuring a dense, brown crust generously covered with a mix of seeds and oats. The surface is uneven and rustic, with visible pumpkin seeds, sunflower seeds, and rolled oats embedded across the top and sides. The loaf has a hearty, artisanal appearance, with a slightly domed top and squared-off ends. The crust appears thick and textured, suggesting a crunchy exterior, while the interior is likely soft and airy. There are no visible slices, and the bread is whole and uncut. No branding, packaging, or labeling is present on the loaf.
description: A whole, rectangular multigrain bread loaf with a thick, seed- and oat-covered crust and a rustic, artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: The broad side of the loaf is visible, showing a dense covering of seeds and oats on the crust.
description_view_1: One of the short ends is shown, highlighting the loaf's height and the distribution of seeds and oats on the end crust.
description_view_2: The opposite broad side is visible, similar to view 0, with a slightly different seed pattern and crust texture.
description_view_3: The other short end is shown, displaying a more uniform crust with fewer seeds compared to the sides.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick and rustic, densely covered with a mix of seeds and oats, giving it a textured, uneven appearance. There are no visible scoring marks or flour dusting, and the seeds are distributed irregularly across the surface.
